issue_title: Keep episode speakers when applying saved templates
issue_body:
**Phase:** Harden — making the existing flow actually work

Fix the saved show identity/template flow so applying a reusable show template to a new or existing episode preserves the episode's current Host, Guest 1, and Guest 2 assignments instead of replacing them with the speakers from the template. The template should carry reusable visual identity, layout, style, brand, and export settings, while the episode keeps its own cast.

## Acceptance (definition of done)
Given an episode with Host, Guest 1, and Guest 2 already assigned, when the creator applies a saved show template or starts from a saved show identity, the episode still shows the same speaker names and roles throughout setup, workspace, audio polish, review, and export; only reusable show styling/layout/brand settings are applied from the template. A regression test covers applying a saved template with different original speakers and confirms no current speaker assignments are overwritten.

---
This is the current active step for this product. The maintainer will only merge a pull request that completes THIS step and demonstrably works. Open a PR that closes this issue.

_Why this step now: Checklist: create a new episode by Riverside link or synced uploads: works for setup/import path, Riverside validation still not fully proven; assign files to Host/Guest 1/Guest 2 buckets: works; add host/guest social links for names/topics/references/brands/spellings: works after the name-corruption fix; choose preset visual style, preview, and apply it: works; open reusable canvas editor with layered podcast elements: works, but layer locking has an open hardening bug; clean and balance audio with creator-facing controls: works, but continuation after apply was not independently probed; add captions, b-roll overlays, callouts, title moments, and engagement patterns: works per completed visual moments step; save a finished layout/style as a reusable show template: partial because bug #36 says reapplying a saved show identity can replace the current episode's speakers; export polished long-form episode: works behind the required review gate. The next step targets the reusable template bug because it can corrupt the central repeat-episode workflow and user speaker data, so it must be hardened before any expansion._
